name: Chocolate Pecan Rum Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except powdered sugar, in a large bowl.
2. Mix well.
3. Chill for 20 minutes.
4. Shape by spoonful into round balls.
5. Store in a tightly covered, airtight container.
6. Just before serving or giving, roll in powdered sugar.
Makes 100 balls.
